# Drone News 48h Brief — April 27, 2026

_Window: last 48 hours; 81 incidents._

## Summary
Over the past 48 hours, drone-related incidents have notably surged, particularly in Romania and regions affected by the ongoing conflict between Ukraine and Russia. Romanian authorities are grappling with multiple drone crashes, including Ruasiian drones causing significant disturbances and raising security alerts, while neighboring Ukraine has also reported drone strikes, reflecting escalating tensions. Meanwhile, smuggling activities via drone are highlighted with arrests in Michigan and reported attempts in various locations, emphasizing the challenges posed by unauthorized drone use. Airports in Dubai and Munich experienced disruptions due to drone activity, demonstrating the wider implications of this growing phenomenon on civil aviation and public safety. Overall, incidents reflect both increased threats and the complexities of drone regulations in conflict-affected areas.

**By category:** airport: 9 • arrest: 1 • crash: 14 • interference: 1 • other: 28 • security: 3 • smuggling: 9 • terrorism: 16
**Top queries:** drone incident (26), drone terrorism (23), drone crash (8), drone smuggling (6), unauthorized drone (6)

## Clusters
